metadata.title: Build a Quantum Energy Ladder with Claude Code + Manim
metadata.color_semantics: Okabe-Ito: TEAL #009E73 = energy levels/allowed, CRIMSON #D55E00 = annotations/ratios. INK for all text.
metadata.note: Medhavy register. B00=brand intro; B01–B04=one simulation segment (PIB energy spectrum); B05=brand outro. Pronunciation: narration sends 'Medhavy' to ElevenLabs; on-screen shows 'Medhavy'.

beats.narration_text: Medhavy A-I. From Sanskrit — meaning intelligent, or intellectually brilliant. The perfect name for our A-I-powered intelligent learning systems.

lines: — the perfect name for our AI-powered

beats.narration_text: Run it. Two things to verify. First: the ratio E-two over E-one. The ratio chip shows four-point-zero-zero-zero. That is the n-squared law — exact, not approximate. Second: E-one is above zero. The ground state rests at point-zero-nine-four electron-volts. No matter how you cool this system the particle never stops. Both correct. Ready to iterate.
Medhavy. A-I-powered intelligent learning systems. On YouTube, at Medhavy A-I. Medhavy dot com.
